summary: Complete testing of AgênciaOS 4 features: Leads+Pipeline, Pipeline Management, Operational Cards, and Content/Carousel. All 13 backend tests pass (100%). All 4 frontend features verified working.

issues: Service tile toggles are custom circle elements (not standard Switch/toggle components). No role='switch' attribute found - may impact accessibility and testability. They appear to work visually but aren't standard semantic toggles.

critical_code_review_comments: Operacional service tile toggles lack role='switch' or aria attributes - minor accessibility concern
Login form works via email/password API but Playwright form submission initially failed - required localStorage token injection workaround (not a bug, just test tooling behavior)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Lead One (x2), LeadFrontendTest, TEST_Client Operacional during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 features fully tested. Backend API uses: lead_id (not id), stage_id (not id), client_id (not id) as primary key fields. Reorder stages API expects {stages: [{stage_id, order}]} not {stage_ids: [...]}. Auth uses localStorage key 'agenciaos_token'. TOKEN injection needed before navigation for playwright testing.

features_verified.feature1_leads_pipeline: PASS - Novo Lead modal shows step 2 'Adicionar ao Pipeline' with stage dropdown after successful lead creation
features_verified.feature2_pipeline_management: PASS - Gerenciar button opens PipelineEditModal with draggable stages list. GET stages, PATCH reorder, PATCH rename all work
features_verified.feature3_operational_cards: PASS - Creating client auto-creates operational card. GET /api/operational returns 200 with client data embedded. 4 service tiles shown. Toggle PATCH endpoint works.
features_verified.feature4_carousel_generation: PASS - GET/PUT /api/settings/carousel-webhook work. POST /api/content/carousel/generate returns 400 when webhook not set. Configuracoes page shows N8N Webhook de Carrossel section.
